creator: shaun@shamz.net
text:
After a bit of manual configuration to get my new flatpanel screen working, I thought I'd see if it was useful information for anyone else out there.

diff against 

$FreeBSD: doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/x11/chapter.sgml,v 1.173 2006/05/30 23:08:25 trhodes Exp $

can be downloaded at http://shamz.net/flatpanel_doc.diff

I haven't verified the mark-up syntax to see if it will build or not. Don't have all of the tools installed here yet.

Hope I was of service.
